message:
feat(demo_showcase): Expand help overlay with mouse, feature legend, and links

Add comprehensive help content to the help overlay (F1):
- Mouse section: click to focus/activate, scroll within lists
- Feature Legend: maps OpenTUI features to where they're visible:
  - Alpha blending (overlays + glass panels)
  - Scissor stack (sidebar/log scroll clipping)
  - Opacity stack (tinted UI + overlay backdrop)
  - Grapheme pool (unicode panel + emoji)
  - OSC 8 links (logs + help in term)
  - Hit grid (clickable buttons/nav)
  - Pixel buffers (preview animated orb)
  - Diff rendering (efficient partial updates)
- Links section: repo and docs URLs

Completes bd-3pe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
